夜のマーケット。昼と比べて人通りは少ないものの <br>夜の買い物を楽しむ人々が:
The night market. Though less crowded than daytime, there were still
people out enjoying their evening shopping.
ほぉ。昼間の雰囲気とはまた全然違うなぁ。<br>夜にしか開いてない店もあるみたい:
Ohh, it's got a totally different vibe from daytime. And there seem to
be shops that only open at night—might as well take a look.
……ん、この店は？ <br>宝石……いや、魔石細工の店……？:
...Hmm, what's this shop? Gemstones... no, a magic stone craft
shop...?
とある店の軒先に魔石を加工した装飾品が並んでいた。<br>昼間のマーケットではな:
Under a shop's eaves, magic stone accessories were displayed—rare
items not often seen in the daytime market.
魔石細工ってだけでも珍しいが、このデザインは独創的で素晴らしい。<br>まるで芸:
It's rare enough just to see magic stone crafts, but the designs are
so original and wonderful. They're like works of art...
店にならぶ商品を見ていると、<br>中からじっとこちらをうかがっている人影に気づ:
As I was looking at the products arranged in the shop, I noticed a
figure inside, watching me intently.
ん？ えーと、ここの店主か？<br>この店に並んでいるのはお前が作ったものなのか:
Huh? Um, are you the shopkeeper? Did you make all these things
displayed here?
……？ おーい？<br>あ、えーと……一応、俺は客のつもりなんだが……: ...? Hey? Ah, um... I'm a customer, you know...
もごもごと言葉を漏らす女性。<br>彼女の身につけたブローチが、どこか片言な声色:
A woman mumbled something unintelligible. Then the brooch she wore
began to speak in a stilted, broken voice.
――イラッシャイマセ。<br>ゴ用件ハ、ワタクシガ承リマス。: WELCOME. I SHALL ATTEND TO YOUR NEEDS.
うわっ！？ な、なんだ今のは！？<br>そのブローチが喋ってるのか……？: Whoa! W-what was that just now? Is that brooch talking...?
ハイ。スティーラ様ハ、会話ガ苦手デシテ……。<br>オ客様トハ、ワタクシガ、オ話:
YES. LADY STEELA HAS DIFFICULTY WITH CONVERSATION. I SHALL
SPEAK WITH THE CUSTOMER.
装飾品に喋らせる、か……。<br>さすが魔石細工の店だ。:
So it makes accessories talk... That's a magic stone craft shop for
you.
それで、スティーラ、というんだな。 <br>この店に並んでる商品はスティーラの作:
So her name is Steela. Are the products displayed here made by
Steela?
ハイ。全テ、スティーラ様ノ製作サレタ、品々デス。: YES. ALL ITEMS ARE CRAFTED BY LADY STEELA.
全部自分で作ったのか……そいつはすごいな。 <br>加工の難しい魔石をこうも見事:
She made all of them herself? That's incredible. To make such
beautiful accessories out of hard-to-work magic stones like this...
実用性と芸術性を兼ね備えたデザインは見事だし、加工も丁寧。<br>もはや商品とい:
The designs blend practicality and artistry wonderfully, and the
craftsmanship is meticulous. They're works of art, not just products.
これだけ見事な装飾品は俺も初めて見るよ。<br>その若さでこの技術、余程の研鑽を:
I've never seen ornaments this exquisite. For someone your age to
have this skill, you must have trained a lot.
……なんだ、普通に喋れるんじゃないか。: ...Well, you can speak just fine, can't you?
あ、あぅ……え、えっと……<br>そ、そんなに褒めてもらえたの……その……初めて:
Ah, um... w-well... to receive such praise... it's... the first time for
me...
そうなのか？ 素晴らしいものを素晴らしいと言っただけだ。<br>お世辞を言ったわ:
Really? I just said something wonderful is wonderful. I wasn't
flattering you. You should be confident.
う……嬉しい……です。<br>え、えと……魔石の研究と細工は、小さい頃からやって:
U-um... that makes me happy... Well... I've been researching and
crafting magic stones since I was little...
スティーラ様ハ、ペルディオンニテ最上位ノ<br>スグレタ魔石細工師デシタ。:
LADY STEELA WAS THE FOREMOST MAGIC STONE CRAFTSMAN IN
PERDION.
さ、最上位なんて言いすぎ……！<br>ま、まだまだ勉強中の身ですっ！: T-that's too much, saying top-level...! I-I'm still training!
これだけの作品を生み出せるんだ、トップクラスの腕前だと俺も思うぞ。<br>しかし:
To create works like these, I'd say you're top-class. But why would
you come all the way to a dangerous Frontline Base like this?
高品質ナ魔石ヲ入手スルタメ、デス。<br>スティーラ様ノ作品ニハ、スグレタ魔石ガ:
IT IS TO OBTAIN HIGH-QUALITY MAGIC STONES. LADY STEELA'S
WORKS REQUIRE SUPERB MAGIC STONES.
そ、そうなんです。大穴には、珍しい魔石がたくさん見つかるって聞いて、<br>そ、:
Y-yes, that's right. I heard the Abyss has many rare magic stones,
s-so that's why I came here...
スティーラ様ハ魔石ヲ探スタメ、<br>昼ハ採掘ニ参加シテイマス。:
LADY STEELA PARTICIPATES IN MINING DURING THE DAY TO SEARCH
FOR MAGIC STONES.
ほう、採掘部隊に参加して自分で探しているのか？: Oh, you join the mining team and search yourself?
は、はい。加工に適した魔石は、<br>自分で探さないとなかなか見つけられなくて…:
Y-yes. Stones suitable for crafting are hard to find unless I look for
them myself...
魔石の大きさと品質、こめられた魔力の強さ、純度、属性……。 <br>どれが違って:
A magic stone's size, quality, mana strength, purity, and element—if
any is off, you can't make an ideal piece.
なるほど。魔石に関しても相当詳しいようだな。<br>で、昼間は魔石探しがあるから:
I see. You're pretty knowledgeable about magic stones too. That's
why you only open the shop at night—you search during the day.
は、はい。加工作業に時間もかかりますし、<br>集中してやらなきゃいけないので、:
Y-yes. The crafting takes time, and I need to concentrate, so I can
only open at this hour...
スティーラ様ハ、 <br>人ノ多イ昼間ニ開店スルノガ怖イソウデス。:
LADY STEELA IS AFRAID TO OPEN THE SHOP DURING THE BUSY
DAYTIME.
怖い？ えーと、昼間のほうが客が多く来そうだが……:
Scared? Well, I'd think more customers would come during the day,
though...
あ、あの……お客様がいっぱい来ちゃうと……<br>いっぱいお話ししなくちゃいけな:
Ah, um... if a lot of customers come... I'd have to talk a lot... and I'm
really not good at that kind of thing...
なるほどな。しかし、商売としては勿体ないよな。<br>このクオリティならほしがる:
I see. But it's a waste as a business. With quality like this, there'd be
plenty of customers who'd want it.
えっと、えっと……そ、そんなにお客様来られちゃったら……。<br>や、やっぱり困: Um, um... if that many customers came... I'd be in trouble... Uu...
……ん？ <br>そこにある、布をかぶったやつは……: Hm? That one over there, covered with cloth...
<user>は店の奥にある、<br>大きな布をかけられた作品を示した。:
Commander pointed to a large cloth-covered piece at the back of the
shop.
ずいぶんと大きいが、あれも売りものなのか？: It's pretty big—is that for sale too?
え、えっと、まだ制作途中で未完成なんですが……。 <br>見てもらえます、か？: Um, it's still unfinished... but would you like to see it?
スティーラが布を取ると、 <br>太陽を模した金色の魔石細工が、夜の闇の中で穏や:
When Steela removed the cloth, a gold magic stone craft shaped like
the sun glowed softly in the night.
これは……すごいな。 <br>丁寧な装飾も、使われた魔石の美しさも素晴らしい。:
This is... incredible. The detailed ornamentation and the beauty of the
magic stones are both exceptional.
何より人に希望を与えるような力がある。 <br>まるで未来を照らす輝きだな……。:
Above all, it has the power to give people hope. It's like a light
shining into the future...
つ……伝わりますか？ こ、これは、絶望に抗って戦う、<br>この前線基地の皆さん:
Y-you can tell? I-I made this to represent everyone at this Frontline
Base fighting against despair.
ここで過ごすうちに、なんだかそういうイメージが湧いてきて……。<br>そ、それを:
As I spent time here, that image just came to me... and I felt I wanted
to shape it into something, so...
なるほど、誰かに依頼された商品ってわけじゃないのか。: I see, so it wasn't commissioned by someone.
そ、そうですね。買う人……いるのかな……。<br>な、なんだか大きな作品になっち:
Y-yes, that's right. I wonder if anyone will want to buy it... It ended
up being pretty big...
なぁ、引き取り手が決まっていないなら、俺に譲ってくれないか。<br>これなら司令:
Hey, if you don't have a buyer for it yet, can you let me have it? This
would be perfect for the Command HQ interior.
えっ……ええっ！？ 司令本部！？<br>そ、そんな目立つところに飾られたら、ど、:
Huh? What?! Command HQ?! If it's put in such a noticeable place, I-I
wouldn't know what to do...
ん？ 何か不服か？: Hm? Do you have a problem with that?
そ、そんなの……いっぱい色んな人に見られちゃうじゃないですかぁ……<br>な、な:
Th-that would mean... so many people would see it... I feel...
embarrassed...
前線基地の人々をイメージして作ってるんだろ？<br>だからこそ、司令本部に飾らせ:
You made it with the people of this Frontline Base in mind, right?
That's exactly why I want to have it displayed at Command HQ.
えっと……あれ？<br>ひょっとして……まさか、あなたは……: Um... huh? Could it be... no way, you're...
スティーラ様。<br>コチラノオ客様ハ、前線基地ノ司令官様デス。:
LADY STEELA. THIS CUSTOMER IS THE LORD COMMANDER OF THE
FRONTLINE BASE.
安心しろ、報酬はしっかり払うぞ。<br>俺の金じゃなく、基地の金だけどな。で、い:
Don't worry, I'll pay you properly. Well, it's not my money, it's the
base's. So, how much will you sell it for?
え、えっと……ま、まだお値段なんて考えてなくて……<br>ど、どうしよう……: U-um... I haven't thought about the price yet... Wh-what should I do...
とりあえず、手付金としてこれでどうだ？: For now, how about this as a deposit?
<user>は金貨のずっしり入った袋を<br>スティーラの目の前のテーブルに置く:
Commander placed a bag heavy with gold coins on the table before
Steela.
はわわっ！ こ、こんなに！？<br>い、いただけませんよ、こんな大金！: Eeek! Th-this much! I-I can't accept such a huge amount!
これは作品作りに集中してもらうための手付金としての半分だ。<br>作品が出来上が:
This is half as a deposit so you can focus on your work. When it's
finished, I'll pay the other half.
ひぃっ！？ これで半分！？<br>だ、ダメですよ、そんな無駄遣いは……: Eep! This is half! Th-that's no good, such an extravagance...
無駄遣いなんかじゃない。依頼してるのはこっちだ。<br>スティーラの作品には人の:
It's not a waste. I'm the one making the request. Your works have the
power to move people.
戦いに赴くものへ希望を与える作品。<br>前線基地の皆の象徴になる作品に対する報:
It's a piece that gives hope to those heading into battle, and
compensation for a work that'll symbolize the Frontline Base.
ぜ、前線基地の皆さんの象徴になる作品……: A symbol for everyone at the Frontline Base...
ああ。だから、このくらいの報酬は受け取ってほしい。<br>完成を楽しみにしてるよ:
Yeah. So I want you to accept this compensation. I'm looking forward
to its completion.
うぅ……け、結構なプレッシャーですけど……: *whimper*... Th-that's quite a lot of pressure though...
あ～、すまん。そんなつもりじゃなかったんだがな。<br>スティーラは、頭に浮かん:
Ah, sorry. I didn't mean it that way. Just shape the image in your mind
as is, that's fine.
は、はいっ！ わ、分かりました！<br>素敵な作品に仕上がるように……こ、心を込:
Y-yes! I-I understand! I'll put my heart into it so that it turns out to
be a wonderful piece!
ああ。作品の完成、楽しみにしてるぞ。<br>えーと、俺の部屋に飾る用のも１つ買っ:
Yeah. I'm looking forward to its completion. Well, I think I'll buy one
to decorate my room too... and maybe one as a souvenir...
複数の魔石細工を購入して去っていった<user>。<br>その背中を見送り、ステ:
Commander purchased several magic stone crafts and left. Steela
watched him go, her cheeks faintly flushed, and murmured.
……司令官様って、なんか、もっと怖そうな人だと想像してたけど<br>……全然違っ:
I used to think you'd be much scarier, Lord Commander... but you
were completely different.
うん……！ わたしの魔石細工……あんなに褒めてくれて……<br>嬉しかったな……:
Yeah...! He praised my magic stone craft so much... I was really
happy...
スティーラはふと、作成途中の魔石細工を見つめる。<br>その中心には、前線基地の:
Steela gazed at the unfinished magic stone craft. At its center was
carved the Commander of the Frontline Base.
これ、前線基地の司令官様をイメージしたものだったんだけど……<br>フフッ、もう:
This was modeled after the Lord Commander of the Frontline Base...
Fufu, I guess I need to recarve his face to be kinder.
ソンナニ素敵ナ顔ダチデシタカ？<br>モシカシテ、一目ボレナサイマシタ？:
WAS HIS FACE THAT WONDERFUL? PERHAPS YOU FELL IN LOVE AT
FIRST SIGHT?
ひ、一目惚れ！？ ちょ、ちょっと……な、何言ってるの！<br>そんなんじゃ……！:
L-Love at first sight! H-hold on... what are you saying! It's nothing
like that...!
失礼シマシタ。司令官様ニツイテ語ッテル、スティーラ様ノ声ガ<br>ウレシソウダッ:
MY APOLOGIES, LADY STEELA. WHEN YOU SPOKE OF THE LORD
COMMANDER, YOUR VOICE SOUNDED SO HAPPY, I COULD NOT HELP IT...
もう、何言ってるの！<br>さてと、今日はお店閉じて、ご依頼された作品作りに集中:
Geez, what are you saying! Well then, I'm going to close up shop for
today and focus on the commissioned work...
ソウシマショウ！<br>素敵ナ司令官様ノタメニ！: THAT IS A GOOD IDEA! FOR THE WONDERFUL LORD COMMANDER!
ちょ……ちょっと！ あんまりしつこいと怒るよっ！<br>ホ、ホントにそういうんじ: H-hey! If you keep teasing me, I'll get mad! I-it's really not like that...
数日後、スティーラの完成させた魔石細工のインテリアは、<br>司令本部の入り口の: A few days later, the finished magic stone craft was placed at Command HQ's entrance, right where everyone would see it.
その華麗な作品は、司令本部を訪れた前線基地の人々の目に止まり、<br>前線基地の: The splendid piece caught the eyes of Frontline Base personnel visiting Command HQ and was later praised as one of the base's symbols.
